detail: init objective="Resolve OpenCodex GitHub issue #86 as a verified timeout-semantics product fix. Concrete outcome: routed non-OpenAI web-search requests, especially slow local LM Studio models, must no longer misuse the global connect/header timeout as an opaque full-generation cutoff; the system must retain a finite hang guard, report the exact phase that timed out, preserve cancellation and 429 behavior, and keep eager versus in-stream response contracts coherent. Scope: inspect and, after audit, modify only the owning web-search/server/config/test/documentation surfaces such as src/web-search/loop.ts, src/web-search/index.ts, src/server/responses.ts, src/types.ts, focused tests, structure/04_transports-and-sidecars.md, and the required devlog implementation unit. Preserve all unrelated dirty-worktree changes and do not reset, checkout, stash, clean, or rewrite user work. Out of scope: GUI redesign, unrelated provider/catalog work, dependency upgrades, remote commits or pushes, GitHub issue comments, live external-provider requests, and secret-bearing configuration changes. Acceptance criteria: DONE only when a red-first regression proves the former eager timeout failure, the audited implementation distinguishes connection/header wait from slow-but-progressing or separately bounded generation behavior, first-iteration and later-iteration timeout contracts are tested, hosted sidecar non-invocation or invocation is asserted at the right phase, cancellation and 429 rotation remain bounded, error and request-log wording identifies the timed-out phase, relevant source-of-truth docs match code, targeted tests and project typecheck/build pass, and an independent sol-medium review reports no blocking findings. NOOP only if fresh evidence proves current code already meets every criterion. BLOCKED means a required local tool or repository invariant is externally unavailable after three evidence-backed attempts. UNSAFE means completion would require destructive git operations, secrets, or live provider impact. NEEDS_HUMAN means a genuinely product-defining choice cannot be resolved from current code and issue evidence. BUDGET_EXHAUSTED applies only to an explicit user budget; none is imposed here, so continue through compaction using durable artifacts. Verification evidence: red/green focused Bun tests, request-log and timeout contract tests, bun test for affected suites, project typecheck or build command from package.json, git diff inspection, source-of-truth consistency check, and independent review. Expected terminal outcome: DONE with no pending criteria. First work-phase: reproduce the old failure in a deterministic harness, map existing timeout/cancellation boundaries, and write the diff-level audited plan before implementation. Execution mode: HOTL spec-satisfaction repair loop. Tool and credential scope: local filesystem, local Bun tests, read-only git history/status, cxc state tools, and sol-medium subagents only; no remote writes or provider credentials. Write scope is limited to the files and devlog unit named above. Token, cost, and wall-clock bounds: no user-imposed cap; continue until verified DONE or an honest BLOCKED, UNSAFE, or NEEDS_HUMAN terminal condition." criteria=0
registered wp1 with six evidence-backed criteria; host armed from frozen objective
red-first BUG-R86 suite: exit 1, 0 pass, 3 fail; forced nonstream parse, progress killed by connect deadline, and unsafe sidecar dispatch all activated
green BUG-R86 3/3; web-search plus sidecar-abort 35/35; timeout/progress/plan/bounded/deadline contracts 44/44
wp1-t2 implemented distinct response-header and routed-generation clocks with streamed semantic buffering
wp1-t3 preserved JSON/SSE boundaries, 499 cancellation, sidecar counts, and bounded 429 rotation
wp1-t4 synchronized exact errors, logging, config, SOT, and EN/KO/ZH docs
affected aggregate 271/271; full project 2003/2003 across 199 files; typecheck and diff-check exit 0; final sol-medium review PASS
wp1-t5 completed focused/full gates and independent sol-medium review
c1 red-first regression activates old failure and green BUG-R86 passes 3/3
c2 distinct finite header/body progress clocks pass isolated race tests
c3 first and later JSON/SSE plus sidecar-count contracts pass
c4 cancellation and 429 rotation remain finite under hostile cancel implementations
c5 phase-accurate errors, logs, config, and multilingual docs audited PASS
wp1 complete; issue #86 timeout-semantics repair verified with no pending criterion
cxc loop validate OK: complete plan and every met criterion carries captured evidence; devlog archived from _plan to _fin
